content_body: Thank you so much for letting us stay in your beautiful cabin! We enjoyed the pool table and many other activities. Now that the snow has stopped, we are looking forward to enjoying the hot tub on the last night. The view from the porch is absolutely amazing. We had such a great time in Blue Ridge on all of the trails and look foward to more great trips in the future. The cabin is gorgeous; everything is beyond nice.
title: Winter in the North Georgia Mountains
